issue.title: App crashes when uploading large files
issue.body:
## Describe the bug

When I try to upload a file larger than 10MB, the application throws an unhandled exception and crashes.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to the upload page
2. Select a file > 10MB
3. Click upload
4. Application crashes with a 500 error

## Expected behavior

The file should either upload successfully or show a clear error message.

## Environment

- OS: macOS 14.2
- Python: 3.11.4
- Version: v1.2.0
